description_long: This sunshade features a broad, hexagonal canopy with alternating bands of light and medium tan colors, creating a visually appealing striped pattern. The canopy is constructed in a stepped, tiered design, with each layer slightly smaller than the one below, giving it a geometric, modern look. The structure is supported by a single, straight, black pole that extends downward from the center of the canopy, ending in a lighter-colored base segment. The canopy appears to be made of a durable fabric or synthetic material, while the pole is likely metal or coated steel for stability. The edges of the canopy are plain, with no visible fringe or decorative trim. There is no visible branding, signage, or additional ornamentation on the canopy or pole.
description: A hexagonal, tiered sunshade with alternating tan stripes and a single black support pole, featuring a plain edge and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hexagonal, tiered canopy with alternating tan stripes and the central black pole.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stepped, layered structure of the canopy and the straight, vertical support pole.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the same striped, geometric canopy and central pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the canopy's tiered design and the pole's vertical alignment.
attribute_canopy_design: hexagonal, tiered, multi-panel with concentric stepped layers
attribute_support_structure_style: single straight central pole, minimalist design
